violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the toilet room was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as milk and cream) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

Beverages were observed stored on the floor beside the curbed mop sink. Food must be stored in a clean dry location where it is not subject to dust or splash, and at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
Beverages were observed stored on the floor in the toilet room. Food may not be stored in a toilet room. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

Thermometers are lacking in the milk refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024
Some ceiling tiles in t he market are in poor repair, with stains from previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the open reach-in, and the milk refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the two ice cream chest freezers have an accumulation of frost, ice, and debris. Equipment must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the coffee area such as milk and cappuccino machines, coffee maker, and single service items. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024

The 3 bay sink area has an accumulation of soil residue, unused items, and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024
The floor in the back area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024

The area outside the back door including the stairs has an accumulation of trash and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on shelf and box behind the counter. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024
